DP.133.0000:
Howdy, there!\f
Let me examine your Pokémon to see
if it’s worthy of a scarf!\f
DP.133.0002:
This isn’t what I had hoped to see...\f
I can’t lie to you, so I’ll just have
to tell it to you straight.\f
This Pokémon’s not bad, but it’s not
good, either. It’s just so-so.\f
If you want to improve this one’s
condition, feed it some more Poffins!
DP.133.0003:
Your Pokémon is growing up really
good. My hat’s off to you.\f
I was going to give you a scarf,
but your Bag’s full.
DP.133.0004:
Your [0100,0000]’s looking good!
I’d say it’s pretty impressive!\f
I’ll tell you what, I’ll give you
this [0108,0001]!\f
DP.133.0005:
The Red Scarf stands for passion!\f
Let a Pokémon hold it to give it
an edge in Cool Contests.
DP.133.0006:
The Blue Scarf represents the
vastness of the sea!\f
Let a Pokémon hold it to give it
an edge in Beauty Contests.
DP.133.0007:
The Pink Scarf represents charm!\f
Let a Pokémon hold it to give it
an edge in Cute Contests.
DP.133.0008:
The Green Scarf represents the
spring breeze!\f
Let a Pokémon hold it to give it
an edge in Smart Contests.
DP.133.0009:
The Yellow Scarf stands for
toughness!\f
Let a Pokémon hold it to give it
an edge in Tough Contests.
DP.133.0010:
I’m out of scarves to give you!
I’m out of things to say, too!
DP.133.0011:
My brother’s girlfriend is the
Massage Girl in Veilstone City.\f
They stay in touch by having Pokémon
hold Mail for each other.
